reasonCodeMap.description: Input contains malformed or invalid rows that may corrupt bulk-action outcomes.
reasonCodeMap.stepHint: Clean malformed input rows and rerun the simulation before execution.

reasonCodeMap.description: Selected rows are missing from validated input and may represent stale state.
reasonCodeMap.stepHint: Refresh selection data and remove stale or missing exception ids.

reasonCodeMap.description: Selected rows include multiple workflow statuses and may require operator review.
reasonCodeMap.stepHint: Split selections by status and execute each bucket independently.

reasonCodeMap.description: Selection includes high/critical delta magnitudes that increase rollback risk.
reasonCodeMap.stepHint: Stage high-delta rows into a guarded batch with explicit rollback owner.
